reason: Frontend spec entry — lists all conventions; this task lives in web/ frontend layer.
Feature-first layout; this task adds web/src/features/{dashboard,audit,admin}/{components,hooks,api,routes} respecting the directory contract.

Stateful render branches (loading / unauthorized / empty / error), text-summary-with-chart rule, no-color-only state, masked sensitive cell. Critical for dashboard cards and audit-log sensitive-field rendering.

Domain hook naming (use-dashboard-summary, use-audit-log, use-llm-providers, use-can-view-audit-log, use-can-operate-kill-switch); polling rule (60s refetchInterval, pause on visibilitychange='hidden'); mutation reset conventions.

URL state for dashboard asset-group filter / audit multi-dim filter; server state via TanStack Query; no copying audit/admin records to global; admin write twoStep confirmation as local component state.
Branded ID aliases for AuditId / ProviderId / ToolConfigId / LogSourceId / MailSourceId; runtime zod parse at MSW boundary; forbidden any.
UI forbidden patterns — chart-only without text summary, missing unauthorized state, sensitive fields rendered as plain strings, color-only signaling — all relevant to dashboard / audit / admin.

Frontend mirrors backend zod contracts; this task creates 3 NEW frontend-only contracts (dashboard-summary / audit-log / admin-config) ahead of backend — must document them as 'pending parity' for the integration verification phase.

Reuse <StatusBadge>/<UnauthorizedState>/<EmptyState>/<ErrorState>/<ConfirmationDialog>/<MaskedCell /> from console + vuln + log; reuse useCanViewRawEvidence pattern for new useCanViewAuditLog / useCanManageAdminConfig / useCanOperateKillSwitch hooks; do not duplicate permission-point literals.

Platform PRD §3 permission boundaries (audit_log:view, kill_switch:operate, llm_provider:manage, log_source:manage, tool_config:manage); §11 dashboard 7 metrics specification; §12 audit log retention/redaction rules.
Parent MVP PRD: wave order, frontend stack constraints.
This task's own PRD with locked D1–D7 decisions, 7-metric dashboard spec, audit filters, 5 admin sub-pages, kill switch CONFIRM-text two-step gating.
Sibling task that builds App / router / Providers / MSW worker / fetch helper / ActorProvider; this task depends on its shells and reuses its <ConfirmationDialog>/<StatusBadge>/<UnauthorizedState>.

Sibling task that established the 4-domain shared list pattern (URL state, viewer route guard, MSW handler-side query/grouping, RequireRawEvidence pattern). Dashboard's RequireAuditLogView / RequireAdminConfig follow the same shape.
Sibling task that established explicit-edge-case banner pattern (UNAVAILABLE / BODY_ONLY_SIZE_LIMIT). Dashboard mail-metrics card mirrors these terminology choices.
Sibling task introducing <MaskedCell /> and assetGroupId mandatory URL guard; dashboard / audit logs reuse <MaskedCell /> for redacted/sensitive cells.

Source of truth for permissionPoints (audit_log:view, kill_switch:operate, llm_provider:manage, tool_config:manage, log_source:manage, weak_password:cleartext_view, raw_evidence:view) consumed by all gating hooks. Note: kill_switch:operate is currently NOT in the enum — add it as part of this task's contract work.
API error envelope shape that dashboard / audit / admin MSW handlers must emit; admin save/delete failure paths trigger typed errors.
ActorContext / permissionPoints consumed by RequireAuditLogView / RequireAdminConfig route guards and admin two-step confirm dialogs.

logSourceConfigSchema is the existing source-of-truth for /admin/log-sources page; the admin form fields and validation must mirror this exactly. Also normalizedSecurityLogEventSchema / attackTrendBucketSchema for dashboard log metrics.
mailGatewayConfigSchema is the existing source-of-truth for /admin/mail-sources page; admin form mirrors this. mailAnalysisRecordSchema for dashboard phishing-metrics card.
vulnerabilityFindingSchema / vulnerabilityScanResultSchema for dashboard vulnerability-metrics card aggregations.
weakPasswordMaskedFindingSchema / reportRecordSchema for dashboard weak-password-metrics card; remember NEVER to render passwordPlaintext in audit log cells.
TaskRecord / taskStateSchema for dashboard task-status-metrics card and audit log task action records.
Asset group shape for dashboard asset-group filter selector and metrics scoping.
